Appearances on Monday, March 17, 2014:
Robert C. Smith, Esq. [415.294.1465] Specially Appearing for Plaintiffs / Moving Parties
BRIANNA MANNION and TRAVIS LARIMER;
Bradley J. Jameson, Esq. of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP [415.278.9411] Specially Appearing for Deponent / Opposing Party WILLIAM HARKINS, who is also present

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument, adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiffs BRIANNA MANNION'S and TRAVIS LARIMER'S Motion for OCS Re: Contempt is DENIED. All documents have been produced as of the date of the hearing. Documents on file are not redacted. No sanctions. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
